steps.title: Find the main verb
steps.content: The long opening noun phrase names Oscar James Dunn and adds descriptive information, but the sentence still needs a main verb. The date "in 1868" points to a simple past action.

steps.title: Complete the clause
steps.content: A is an infinitive, and B and C are participle forms, so none can serve as the main verb. "Began" supplies the finite past-tense verb needed to complete the sentence. The answer is D.
